canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>transmission</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { 
      background: #0a0a0c; 
      overflow: hidden; 
      cursor: crosshair;
    }
    canvas { display: block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, centerX, centerY;
let audioCtx, noiseNode, noiseGain, signalOsc, signalGain;
let audioStarted = false;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  centerX = W / 2;
  centerY = H / 2;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Audio setup
function initAudio() {
  if (audioStarted) return;
  audioStarted = true;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // White noise generator
  const bufferSize = 2 * audioCtx.sampleRate;
  const noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const output = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    output[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
  }
  
  noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noiseNode.buffer = noiseBuffer;
  noiseNode.loop = true;
  
  // Bandpass filter for radio static texture
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filter.type = 'bandpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 2000;
  filter.Q.value = 0.5;
  
  noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  noiseGain.gain.value = 0.03;
  
  noiseNode.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(noiseGain);
  noiseGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  noiseNode.start();
  
  // Signal oscillator for detected transmissions
  signalOsc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  signalOsc.type = 'sine';
  signalOsc.frequency.value = 440;
  
  signalGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  signalGain.gain.value = 0;
  
  signalOsc.connect(signalGain);
  signalGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  signalOsc.start();
}

// Click to init audio + transmit
canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  transmit(e.clientX, e.clientY);
});

// State
let sweepAngle = 0;
let sweepSpeed = 0.008;
let signals = [];
let transmissions = [];
let staticField = [];
let detectedSignal = null;
let detectionTime = 0;

// Initialize static field
for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
  staticField.push({
    x: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
    y: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
    intensity: Math.random(),
    flicker: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2
  });
}

// Mysterious signals out there
for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
  const dist = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;
  signals.push({
    angle: angle,
    dist: dist,
    freq: 200 + Math.random() * 800,
    pattern: Math.floor(Math.random() * 4),
    strength: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7
  });
}

function transmit(x, y) {
  transmissions.push({
    x: x,
    y: y,
    radius: 0,
    alpha: 1,
    birth: Date.now()
  });
  
  // Transmission beep
  if (audioCtx && signalGain) {
    const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
    signalOsc.frequency.setValueAtTime(1200, now);
    signalGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.15, now);
    signalGain.gain.exponentialDecayTo = 0.001;
    signalGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.001, now + 0.1, 0.1);
  }
}

function drawDish() {
  const dishRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.35;
  
  // Outer ring
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, dishRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Inner rings
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${0.1 + i * 0.02})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, dishRadius * (i / 5), 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Cross hairs
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.15)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(centerX - dishRadius, centerY);
  ctx.lineTo(centerX + dishRadius, centerY);
  ctx.moveTo(centerX, centerY - dishRadius);
  ctx.lineTo(centerX, centerY + dishRadius);
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Sweep line
  const sweepX = centerX + Math.cos(sweepAngle) * dishRadius;
  const sweepY = centerY + Math.sin(sweepAngle) * dishRadius;
  
  // Sweep glow
  const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(centerX, centerY, sweepX, sweepY);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.4)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.8)');
  
  ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
  ctx.lineWidth = 3;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(centerX, centerY);
  ctx.lineTo(sweepX, sweepY);
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Sweep trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.05)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(centerX, centerY);
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, dishRadius, sweepAngle - 0.5, sweepAngle);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.fill();
  
  return dishRadius;
}

function drawStatic(dishRadius) {
  const time = Date.now() * 0.001;
  
  staticField.forEach(s => {
    s.flicker += 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.1;
    const flicker = Math.sin(s.flicker) * 0.5 + 0.5;
    
    if (flicker * s.intensity > 0.6) {
      const x = centerX + s.x * dishRadius;
      const y = centerY + s.y * dishRadius;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(s.x * s.x + s.y * s.y);
      
      if (dist < 1) {
        const alpha = (1 - dist) * flicker * s.intensity * 0.5;
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(100, 200, 255, ${alpha})`;
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, 2, 2);
      }
    }
    
    // Drift
    s.x += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.002;
    s.y += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.002;
    
    // Wrap
    if (Math.abs(s.x) > 1.2) s.x *= -0.9;
    if (Math.abs(s.y) > 1.2) s.y *= -0.9;
  });
}

function drawSignals(dishRadius) {
  const time = Date.now() * 0.001;
  
  signals.forEach(sig => {
    const x = centerX + Math.cos(sig.angle) * sig.dist * dishRadius;
    const y = centerY + Math.sin(sig.angle) * sig.dist * dishRadius;
    
    // Is sweep pointing at this signal?
    let angleDiff = Math.abs(sweepAngle - sig.angle);
    if (angleDiff > Math.PI) angleDiff = Math.PI * 2 - angleDiff;
    
    if (angleDiff < 0.15) {
      // Signal detected!
      const intensity = (1 - angleDiff / 0.15) * sig.strength;
      
      // Visual burst
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 5 + intensity * 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      const grd = ctx.createRadialGradient(x, y, 0, x, y, 5 + intensity * 15);
      grd.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 100, 200, ${intensity})`);
      grd.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(255, 50, 150, ${intensity * 0.5})`);
      grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0)');
      ctx.fillStyle = grd;
      ctx.fill();
      
      // Signal blip at center
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 200, ${intensity})`;
      ctx.fillRect(centerX - 50, centerY + dishRadius + 30, intensity * 100, 3);
      
      // Audio response
      if (audioCtx && signalGain && intensity > 0.3) {
        signalOsc.frequency.setValueAtTime(sig.freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
        signalGain.gain.setValueAtTime(intensity * 0.08, audioCtx.currentTime);
      }
      
      detectedSignal = sig;
      detectionTime = Date.now();
    }
    
    // Faint marker
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Fade signal audio
  if (audioCtx && signalGain) {
    const timeSinceDetection = Date.now() - detectionTime;
    if (timeSinceDetection > 100) {
      signalGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
    }
  }
}

function drawTransmissions(dishRadius) {
  transmissions = transmissions.filter(t => {
    const age = (Date.now() - t.birth) / 1000;
    t.radius = age * 150;
    t.alpha = Math.max(0, 1 - age / 3);
    
    if (t.alpha <= 0) return false;
    
    // Ripple effect
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${t.alpha * 0.5})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(t.x, t.y, t.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Inner ripple
    if (t.radius > 30) {
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 200, ${t.alpha * 0.3})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(t.x, t.y, t.radius - 20, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    
    return true;
  });
}

function drawStatus() {
  ctx.font = '12px monospace';
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6)';
  
  const azimuth = ((sweepAngle * 180 / Math.PI) % 360).toFixed(1);
  ctx.fillText(`AZ: ${azimuth}°`, 20, 30);
  ctx.fillText(`SCANNING...`, 20, 50);
  
  if (detectedSignal && Date.now() - detectionTime < 2000) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.8)';
    ctx.fillText(`SIGNAL DETECTED: ${detectedSignal.freq.toFixed(0)} Hz`, 20, 70);
  }
  
  // Click hint
  if (!audioStarted) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.4)';
    ctx.fillText('[ click to transmit ]', 20, H - 20);
  }
  
  // Coordinates display
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3)';
  const dateStr = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ');
  ctx.fillText(dateStr + ' UTC', W - 170, 30);
}

function drawWaveform() {
  const waveY = H - 60;
  const waveW = 200;
  const waveH = 30;
  const waveX = W - waveW - 20;
  
  // Border
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3)';
  ctx.strokeRect(waveX, waveY, waveW, waveH);
  
  // Waveform (simulated)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  const time = Date.now() * 0.01;
  for (let i = 0; i < waveW; i++) {
    const noise = Math.sin(time + i * 0.3) * Math.sin(time * 0.7 + i * 0.1) * 0.5;
    const signal = detectedSignal && Date.now() - detectionTime < 500 
      ? Math.sin(time * 2 + i * 0.5) * 0.8 
      : 0;
    const y = waveY + waveH / 2 + (noise + signal) * waveH * 0.4;
    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(waveX + i, y);
    else ctx.lineTo(waveX + i, y);
  }
  ctx.stroke();
}

function draw() {
  // Fade trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 12, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  const dishRadius = drawDish();
  drawStatic(dishRadius);
  drawSignals(dishRadius);
  drawTransmissions(dishRadius);
  drawStatus();
  drawWaveform();
  
  // Update sweep
  sweepAngle += sweepSpeed;
  if (sweepAngle > Math.PI * 2) sweepAngle -= Math.PI * 2;
  
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
